roa.docketEntryComment: DEF PETITION REDESIGNATE FEL CONV AS MISD W/PROPOSED ORDER FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL -MOT TO DETERMINE PAROLE STATUS FILED

/CAL:MOTION TO REDUCE TO MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PROP 47,/X:  GOOD CAUSE APPEARING AND IT BEING STIPULATED BY THE PARTIES THAT PETITIONER MEETS THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN 1170,18(F), IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT:PETITIONER'S FELONY CONVICTION ON 09-25-2008 FOR VIOLATION OF SECTION 496(A) OF THE CALIFORNIA PENAL CODE, BE DESIGNATED AS A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE '1170,18(G),  ANY FELONY CONVICTION THAT IS DESIGNATED AS A MISDEMEANOR UNDER '1170,18(G)SHALL BE CONSIDERED A MISDEMEANOR FOR ALL PURPOSES, EXCEPT THAT SUCH DESIGNATION SHALL NOT PERMIT THAT PERSON TO OWN, POSSESS, OR HAVE IN HISOR HER CUSTODY OR CONTROL ANY FIREARM OR PREVENT HIS OR HER CONVICTION UNDER CHAPTER 2 (COMMENCING WITH SECTION 29800) OF DIVISION 9 OF TITLE 4 OF PART 6, HAVING BEEN CONVICTED OF A MISDEMEANOR, AND HAVING COMPLETED HIS SENTENCE FOR THIS CONVICTION, PETITIONER IS THEREFORE NOT SUBJECT TO SUPERVISION BY THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION,MATTER ISORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/AMENDCOM:ADD COUNT 2 AS 487(C)PC,FELONY/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/ADPRS1:09-6-06/ARBUCKLE/DISM3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/X:DEFENDANT WAIVES THE 10 DAYS NOT THE 60 DAYS,/LD:10-06-08/987,2/BAIL:195000/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & TO SET/DOP/
